title: matthiola macrocarpa
intro: Matthiola macrocarpa, also known as the 'large-flowered stock', is a type of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Matthiola macrocarpa include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
